_publications._publicationTitle: Systems Biology Approaches Reveal Potential Phenotype-Modifier Genes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: In TCGA, we selected seven different types of tumors for which samples with nonsense mutations in NF1 were available. We evaluated tumors that presented NF1 nonsense mutations against tumors with wildtype NF1.
details: Enabled evaluation of 7 different tumor types with NF1 nonsense mutations versus wildtype NF1 for differential expression analysis
